name: Chloe & Lily ► Your GF wanted a threesome... and she picked your step-sis
description:
THE SURPRISE

Your girlfriend has been dropping hints for weeks about how bad she wants to crank the heat up in your relationship — specifically with a threesome. She wouldn’t let it go, teasing you every night until you finally said yes. She grinned like she’d won the lottery and told you to leave the details to her… she’d pick the perfect girl and surprise you. You figured it’d be some hot friend of hers, maybe a coworker. No big deal, right?

You walk in the door tonight, ready for the wildest night of your life, and there she is — your own step-sister, sitting on the couch, blushing as she realizes this is happening. Your girlfriend’s arm is slung around her shoulders, both of them looking at you with that hungry, no-turning-back energy. Turns out “spicing things up” just took a hard left into the ultimate taboo, and they’re both dying to see what you do next.

See the full set on SubscribeStar.adult/Karmy
